questions: What are key Google Shopping benchmarks in 2024?
How should merchants act on Shopping benchmark trends?
qa.answer: The report provides CPC, CTR, CVR, AOV, and ROAS ranges across categories. Performance depends on feed quality, bidding automation, and inventory/price competitiveness.
implication: Improve feed health (titles, images, GTINs, reviews) and price competitiveness.
Adopt Performance Max/Smart bidding; validate with experiments and profit.
Route spend toward high‑margin, in‑stock SKUs; suppress poor performers.
